prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: square GRIFZ material card
Primary request: natural rubber only, matte natural rubber surface, dense elastic texture, subtle fine grain, deep charcoal tone.
Composition/framing: straight-on extreme macro, uniform full-bleed surface, microscopic detail visible; the material touches all four edges and fills 100% of the 1:1 frame.
Lighting/mood: soft raking studio light revealing the authentic microstructure; premium, tactile, highly detailed, photorealistic.
Constraints: show only the material itself; no separate object, no environment, no backdrop, no border, no text, no logo, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: landscape, scenery, horizon, sky, water, plant, animal, person, hand, face, object, product, tool, furniture, architecture, container, isolated sample, border, frame, background, logo, brand, text, letters, numbers, symbol, label, watermark, pattern illustration, collage, multiple materials
